2026-04-06T18:21:06.3764501Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3765063Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3765501Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3765880Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3766198Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3766442Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3766606Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3766841Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3767019Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3767260Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3767468Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3767753Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-06T18:21:06.3768015Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
